titleStmt.title: SII 18.149: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 149. (B.K. Nos. 47-48 of 1934-35.) MĀKANŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Mārkaṇḍēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama Year 7, Raktākshi, Uttarāyaṇa-samkrānti Ēkādaśi, Monday. Chālukya-Vikrama year is apparently a mistake for the regnal year of Jagadēkamalla II. The details are slightly irregular. Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti did occur on Monday but the tithi on that day was Chaturdaśi and not Ekādaśi as stated in the record. By the saṁkrānti the date corresponds to A.D. 1144, December 25, Monday.

It records a grant of land made by Boppaṇa of Mākanūr belonging to the Bāli family, with his three brothers, to the god Boppēs11varadēva installed by him. At the time of the grant Mahāpradhāna Sēnādhipati, Kaḍitaverggaḍe, Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi and Paṭṭasāhaṇi Bammadēvarasa was governing Banavase Twelve-thousand and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Kētarasa of the Kadamba family was administering the manneya of the Nūṛuṁbāḍa, from his headquarters Raṭṭapaḷḷi. Another grant was made to the same god by Heggaḍe Chauḍamayya and others while Mahāpradhāna Yōgēśvaradēva was governing Banavase Twelve-thousand. This grant is stated to have been made on Jyēshṭha Ēkādas11i, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpaca
kravarttijagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamāca
ndrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabdama
hāsāmantādhipati śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati kaḍitaverggaḍe kannaḍasandhivigra
hi riyadaṇḍanāyakaṁ paṭṭasāhaṇi bammadēvarasar banavase pannircchāsira
mumaṁ samastadēśamumanāḷuttamire . © svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabdamahāsā
manta vijayalakṣmīkānta kādaṁbavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . vairibaḷabhairavaṁ . śākhācarīṁdradhvajaṁ . rūpa
makaradhvajaṁ mrigarājalāṁcchanaṁ . caturaviriṁcanaṁ . kaḍabēśvaralabdhavaraprasādaṁ . mrigama
dāmōdaṁ . nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmāhāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kētarasar . nū
ṟuṁ bāḍada manneyamanāḷuttaṁ . raṭṭapaḷḷiyanelevīḍinoḷ sukhadinire . © divijare
ṟagalke padanakhada viraḷaru cima kuṭamaṇigaḷoḷ beḷagalkoppuva pārvvatīśanatyu
tsavamaṁ boppaṁge māḍutirkkanavarata . siriya konegaṇnakāntiya suruciramāḷāḷi
kriṣṇanaṁgadyutiyoḷ poreye sitaruciyinoppuva hari rakṣisutirkke boppagā
vuṇḍanuma . Eṟagida divijabrātada miṟuguva maṇimakṭa dalli padanakhaRead makuṭa.
rucigaḷ tuṟugi sodayisuva mukkoḍeyeṟeyaṁ rakṣisuge boppagāvuṇḍanu
ma . janakananūnabhāgyanidhi māḷagavuṇḍanagaṇyapuṇyabhājaneyene peṁpuvetta sati
muddave tāyi hariyammagauḍanoḷpinakaṇi caṭṭagauṁḍanesevārppina būcaṇanaltesōda
rarjjinane kulādhideyvavene boppagāvuṇḍanidēṁ kritārtthanō . musuvaḍiya sāṁda gula
doḷ pesarenisida bālivaṁśadoḷ puṭṭiyu voḷpasadaḷamādudu bāppure vasudheyo
ḷī mākanūra boppaṇaniṁdaṁ . kaṁtuharanaṁ pratiṣṭhisi santōsadiṁ barasi nilisi śāsanamaṁ tāna
nteseye dēvatālayamaṁ taḍeyade boppanatiśayaṁ māḍisida . Ataṁge kiṟiya caṭṭave nī
tiyoḷolidavaggaḷa patibhaktikhyātivideyenipa peṁpinoḷātiśayaṁ dhareyoḷeṁdaḍē baṇni pudō . tana
ge parahitame mukhyaṁ vinayavā mukhyaṁ budhaprasaṁgame mukhyaṁ manamoldīvudu mukhyamivini
tuṁ boppaṇana sahajamenipa guṇaṁgaḷ . māntanavoṁdu satyaveraḍāgamabhāvane mūṟu kāryyani
ściṁtate nālku śaucaguṇavaydu gaṁbhīrateyāṟu śīḷavēḷaṁtaraśuddhiyeṁṭu nayavoṁbatu dāttate
hattenippa rūpaṁ taḷedopputirppanene boppaṇaniṁ kritapuṇyanāvanō . samayaṁ nālkuma
nentuṁ kramadiṁdaṁ varddhisalkavī nālvarttamma manaśviniṁde māḍuva samayōcitama vargge saṁdudiṁta
navarata © śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakāladēḷeneya raktākṣisaṁvatsaradaluttarāyaṇa saṁkrā
ntivyatīpātadēkādasi sōmavāradaṁdu boppagāvuṁḍanuṁ hariyamagāvuṁḍanuṁ caṭṭa
gāvuṇḍanuṁ būcagāvuṁḍanuvirddu brahmasiṁgipaṇṇitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa
dharmmaventeṁdaḍe boppēśvaradēvarggavalliyūcāryyarāhāradānakkaṁ biṭṭa hāḷa haḍuva
ṇageyyal matta 1 hiriya keṟeya keḷage gardde kamma 12 Akkasāli saṁkōjaṁ nālku ponnāya
maṁ salugeyu . baḍagi caṭṭōjaneraḍāra kūliyu kammāṟa jakkōjaneraḍāra kūliyu . Asaga
ra kētaneraḍokala mithunagūliyu . [Aṁ]biga kētadōvaṁ hoḷeyalu puṭṭidalli paṇa 2 ma
neṇṭu piṭṭumī mūrggadalu salisuvaru . © śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ yōgēśvara dēvarbbanavase paṁnicchāsira
manāḷuttuṁ heggaḍe dēvarasargge vaḍḍarāvaḷaṁ herjjuṁkamaṁ koṭṭu sukhadiṁda vāḷuttaviralavara hergga
ḍe cauḍamayyanāyakanuṁ tīkayanāyakanu Ādityanāyakanu caṁgayanāyakanu kāḷi mayya
maduvaṇanuviddu mākanūra boppēśvaradēvargge tamma naḍava suṁkadoḷage biṭṭa dharmmaveṁteṁdaḍe jēṣṭamāsa
dēkādasi sōmavāradaṁdu Alliya taḷabhaṁḍa hattiyamaḷave 20 kke 1 Eḷḷahēṟu 20 kke 1 bandirddavasake
10 kke 1 Ālliya ṭhāṇōghaṁ kāṇi Alliya Eleḍike 1 toṟeyācheyaṁ baṁdaḍḍasārige Eḷḷahēṟige 20 kke
1 ṟa suṁka Ācheyiṁ baṁda baṁgāṟagaruviṁge 20 kke 1 ṟa suṁka heḍeya bīyaṁ keyvōka gadyāṇa 1 kke vi 5 Intī dha
rmmamanārōrvva baṁdavarpratipāḷisi vāraṇāsikurukṣētradal suvarṇna gōdānamaṁ māḍida phaḷamaneydu
varu . matthaṁ Āḍḍasārigeya Īsade naḍasidarappaḍe kaludeṟege 20 Ettige 1 suṁka . kaḍa
yasāya biṭṭa paṇa 2 naḍava manisaru biṭṭa paṇa 1 bōvagēta biṭṭa paṇa 1
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ©
Digital edition of SII 18.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
